---
title: "Multi-Disease Forecast Evaluation Dashboard"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    page-layout: full
---

This dashboard tracks and evaluates Google's predictive model performance for **COVID-19**, **RSV**, and **Influenza** across the 2025/26 season (November '25 to May '26). 

Source code for this dashboard was originally inspired by the [Reich Lab](https://reichlab.io/) at UMass, Amherst. The target data for the three forecast hubs is hospitalizations due to each infection as reported to the National Healthcare Safety Network (NHSN), publicly available through the CDC.

### Model Evaluations

Below you can explore the mean Weighted Interval Score (WIS) partitioned by forecast horizon for each disease. Lower WIS indicates higher forecast accuracy.

::: {.panel-tabset}

## COVID-19

### Forecast Horizon Evaluation (WIS)
![COVID-19 Mean WIS by Horizon](../_site/resources/evals/covid/wis_by_horizon.png){width=80%}

[📥 Download Raw Data: COVID-19 WIS Table](../_site/resources/evals/covid/wis_by_horizon.csv)

## Influenza (Flu)

### Forecast Horizon Evaluation (WIS)
![Flu Mean WIS by Horizon](../_site/resources/evals/flu/wis_by_horizon.png){width=80%}

[📥 Download Raw Data: Flu WIS Table](../_site/resources/evals/flu/wis_by_horizon.csv)

## RSV

### Forecast Horizon Evaluation (WIS)
![RSV Mean WIS by Horizon](../_site/resources/evals/rsv/wis_by_horizon.png){width=80%}

[📥 Download Raw Data: RSV WIS Table](../_site/resources/evals/rsv/wis_by_horizon.csv)

:::

::::{.callout-note}
**Data Context**:
The CDC notes that data for reporting dates beginning November 1, 2024 represent data reported during a mandated reporting period, whereas preceding months represent voluntarily reported data. Two reference dates substantively impacted by NHSN reporting issues (2024-11-23 and 2025-01-25) have been marked as excluded from the core evaluation window.
::::
